top_signals.title: Iran reportedly fires missiles at commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Two commercial ships suffered ‌significant damage ‌but had no casualties, according to the report that cited U.S. officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan attracts young Indian researchers to collaborate on AI, chemistry
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: M&S to face shareholder grilling over cyber attack recovery
top_signals.summary: Marks and Spencer is set to take a grilling from shareholders over whether it has made a meaningful recovery from the cyber attack which wiped out nearly a third of its profit. The FTSE 100 retailer will face investors at its annual general meeting on Tuesday, where it will expect to be quizzed on whether [...]
